Get your API key from MailChimp: Account: Pata ufunguo wako wa API kutoka MailChimp: Mipangilio ya Akaunti > Ziada > Funguo za API
Have your authenticator app ready (Googl: Kuwa tayari na programu yako ya uthibitishaji (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, n.k.)
Image shown when no Gravatar exists for: Picha inayoonyeshwa pale ambapo Gravatar haipo kwa anwani ya barua pepe
Invalid endpoint URL. Must be a full URL: URL ya mwisho batili. Lazima iwe URL kamili inayoanza na https:// (mfano, https://cloud.example.com/remote.php/dav/files/user/backups/)
Link address cannot contain HTML tags: Anwani ya kiungo haiwezi kuwa na vitambulisho vya HTML
Link must start with http:// or https://: Kiungo lazima kianze na http:// au https://
Menu name cannot contain HTML tags: Jina la menyu haliwezi kuwa na vitambulisho vya HTML
Menu name must be 50 characters or less: Jina la menyu lazima liwe herufi 50 au chini
Menu name must be at least 2 characters: Jina la menyu lazima liwe angalau herufi 2
Must start with http:// or https://: Lazima ianze na http:// au https://
Open your authenticator app and scan thi: Fungua programu yako ya uthibitishaji na upige picha msimbo huu wa QR
Optional - only required if OpenLP authe: Si lazima - inahitajika tu ikiwa uthibitishaji wa OpenLP umewezeshwa
Phone number and message required: Nambari ya simu na ujumbe vinahitajika
Please configure endpoint, username, and: Tafadhali sanidi mwisho, jina la mtumiaji, na nywila kwanza.
Please configure the WebDAV settings bef: Tafadhali sanidi mipangilio ya WebDAV kabla ya kuunda nakala rudia ya mbali.
Tafadhali sanidi mipangilio ya WebDAV kabla ya kujaribu muunganisho.
Please configure your MailChimp API key: Tafadhali sanidi ufunguo wako wa API wa MailChimp kutumia muundo huu.
Plugin cannot be disabled because other: Programu-jalizi haiwezi kuzimwa kwa sababu programu-jalizi nyingine zinategemea
Plugin cannot be enabled due to dependen: Programu-jalizi haiwezi kuwezeshwa kwa sababu ya mahitaji ya utegemezi au toleo
Remote backup failed. Check server logs: Nakala rudia ya mbali imeshindwa. Angalia kumbukumbu za seva kwa maelezo.
Save these recovery codes in a safe loca: Hifadhi misimbo hii ya uokoaji mahali salama. Unaweza kuitumia kupata akaunti yako ukipoteza ufikiaji wa programu yako ya uthibitishaji.
Some settings could not be reset: Baadhi ya mipangilio haikuweza kuwekwa upya
These links appear in the \"Links\" menu: Viungo hivi vinaonekana katika menyu ya "Viungo" kwenye upau wa nagivesheni wakati programu-jalizi hii imewezeshwa.
These people are subscribed to your Mail: Watu hawa wameandikishwa kwenye hadhira yako ya MailChimp lakini hawako katika ChurchCRM. Fikiria kuwaongeza kwenye hifadhidata yako au kuwaondoa kutoka MailChimp.
These people exist in ChurchCRM with ema: Watu hawa wako katika ChurchCRM na anwani za barua pepe lakini hawajandikishwa kwenye hadhira hii ya MailChimp. Fikiria kuwaalika kuandikisha.
This will replace any previously enrolle: Hii itabadilisha mbinu zozote za 2FA zilizosajiliwa awali
Two Factor Enrollment Error: Hitilafu ya Usajili wa Hatua Mbili
Two-factor authentication is one of the: Uthibitishaji wa hatua mbili ni moja ya njia bora za kulinda akaunti yako. Tunapendekeza sana kuuendelea kuwa umewezeshwa.
URL to your OpenLP server (e.g., http://: URL ya seva yako ya OpenLP (mfano, http://192.168.1.100:4316)
Value is set - leave blank to keep curre: Thamani imewekwa - acha tupu ili kudumisha ya sasa
WebDAV backups are not correctly configu: Nakala rudia za WebDAV hazijasanidiwa ipasavyo. Tafadhali hakikisha mwisho, jina la mtumiaji, na nywila vimewekwa.
URL ya mwisho wa WebDAV inahitajika.
Jina la mtumiaji la WebDAV linahitajika.

You'll receive backup codes that can be: Utapokea misimbo ya nakala rudia ambayo inaweza kutumika ukipoteza ufikiaji wa programu yako
Your GA4 Measurement ID (G-XXXXXXXXXX): Kitambulisho chako cha Kipimo cha GA4 (G-XXXXXXXXXX)
Your MailChimp account does not have any: Akaunti yako ya MailChimp haina hadhira (orodha) zilizosanidiwa.

Your browser language preference differs: Upendeleo wako wa lugha ya kivinjari ni tofauti na eneo lako la ChurchCRM
Cannot connect to OpenLP at %s. Check th: Haiwezekani kuunganika na OpenLP kwenye %s. Angalia URL ya seva na hakikisha OpenLP inaendesha.

Imeshindwa kuunganika na seva ya OpenLP.
Include country code, e.g. +14155551234: Jumuisha nambari ya nchi, mfano +14155551234 (Marekani) au +447911123456 (Uingereza)

Missing families? Update coordinates to: Familia zinakosekana? Sasisha kuratibu ili kuzijumuisha kwenye ramani.
